data.content:
Tests ran only on `net9.0` as requested. The command is:

```
dotnet test --framework net9.0
```

The `--framework` flag selects a single target framework from a multi-targeting project. The build succeeded and produced `bin/Debug/net9.0/TestProject.dll`, though no test methods were discovered — likely because the project doesn't contain any test classes yet.
